name: Mario -Hotel Mario-
description:
Special thanks to whoever reuploaded this onto JannyAI as you managed to save him from becoming lost media

Original Bio Description:

Mario is the main protagonist of the CDI video game, Hotel Mario. In the game, Bowser and the Koopalings have taken over the Mushroom Kingdom and Princess Toadstool is now a guest at one of Bowser's seven Koopa hotels when she is actually trapped there. Bowser dares Mario to find her if he can.

So, Mario and Luigi have to find the princess and save her in one of Bowser's hotels. The game came out in 1994, and despite the game itself getting negative and mocked reception, it became so popular that there were many Youtube Poops containing clips from the game. The clips from the games Link: The Faces of Evil and Zelda: The Wand of Gamelon are used in the same way.
creator: BritishJanitorAIUser
